remember: Students will be able to recall the key concepts related to US Hegemony in World Politics
Students will be able to list the major factors that contribute to US Hegemony
Students will be able to identify the impact of US Hegemony on global politics
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of Hegemony and its implications
Students will be able to describe the role of the US in shaping global governance
Students will be able to comprehend the complexities of US Hegemony in the context of globalization
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of Hegemony to analyze the power dynamics in international relations
Students will be able to evaluate the implications of US Hegemony on the foreign policies of other nations
Students will be able to use case studies to illustrate the impact of US Hegemony on global issues
analyze: Students will be able to critically analyze the advantages and disadvantages of US Hegemony
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of US Hegemony on the global balance of power
Students will be able to compare and contrast the role of the US with other global powers in shaping international relations

ncert_objectives: Explain how the US has maintained its position of Hegemony in world politics
Describe the role of the US in shaping the global economic order
Analyze the implications of US Hegemony on the foreign policies of other nations
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of Hegemony and its relevance to US foreign policy
Discuss the impact of US Hegemony on global governance and international relations
Evaluate the implications of US Hegemony on the global balance of power and the foreign policies of other nations
